# Feature: MVE line render — identity + LineDirection instruct on TTS

<!-- auto-generated by @implement on 2026-07-14 -->

## Intent

Dialog rendering separates **Identity** (materialized voice profile) from **Performance** (`MveLineDirection`). Every TTS call for designed/cloned profiles must send a compiled `instruct` combining identity and line direction — not only in Voice Design preview.

## Preconditions

- Desktop app with Voicebox sidecar running
- Character has a materialized designed or cloned voice profile (`creationMode: designed|cloned`)
- MVE line has optional LineDirection (emotion, pace, directorNote)

## Happy Path

- [ ] `compilePerformanceInstruct(identity, direction)` returns combined instruct for designed/cloned profiles
- [ ] `VoiceboxVoiceEngineAdapter.renderLine` passes `instruct` to `generateVoiceboxSpeech` when profile is designed/cloned
- [ ] Identity-only and identity+direction produce different instruct payloads (unit tests)
- [ ] `createMveLineRenderSnapshot` includes direction on snapshot (already present — regression)
- [ ] `renderMveLine` passes direction through to adapter (regression)

## Edge Cases

- [ ] Preset/Kokoro profiles: no identity instruct; direction-only instruct when direction set
- [ ] `directorNote` exceeding API limit → truncate with warning in output
- [ ] Empty direction on designed profile → identity-only instruct

## Regression

- [ ] `npm run verify -- --frontend` PASS
- [ ] Existing render-line and voicebox adapter tests green

## Assumptions

- Voicebox `/generate` accepts optional `instruct` (Qwen CustomVoice / cloned profiles)
- Max instruct length 2000 characters (matches identity prompt limit)

## Implementation Notes

- `compilePerformanceInstruct` in `voice-prompt-compiler.ts` — identity + LineDirection → instruct string
- `voicebox.adapter.ts` passes `instruct` to `generateVoiceboxSpeech` for designed/cloned (identity) and preset+direction (performance-only)
- `voicebox-api.ts` optional `instruct` on POST `/generate`
- Unit tests: compiler, adapter payload differences, snapshot direction regression
- `npm run verify -- --frontend` PASS
